gluten.notes: Same cooking time. Slightly different texture. Works well for most pasta dishes.
Can be slightly softer. Watch cooking time carefully.
Add xanthan gum for binding. Best for baking.
Many brands available. Texture differs from wheat bread.
Tamari is gluten-free soy sauce. Nearly identical flavor.

eggs.ratio: 1 egg = 1 tbsp ground flax + 3 tbsp water
eggs.notes: Let sit 5 minutes before using. Works for binding, not for rising.
eggs.cookingAdjustment: Mix and let gel before adding

eggs.ratio: 1 egg = 1 tsp baking powder + 1 tbsp vinegar
eggs.notes: Helps with rise. Add vinegar to wet ingredients, baking powder to dry.
Many brands available. Very similar taste and texture.

dairy.notes: Use 75% of butter amount. Adds different flavor profile.
Solid at room temp like butter. Mild coconut flavor.
Neutral flavor. Good for cooking and baking.
Slightly nutty flavor. Thinner than dairy milk.
dairy.cookingAdjustment: May need to reduce other liquids slightly

dairy.notes: Rich and creamy. Slight coconut flavor.
dairy.cookingAdjustment: Chill can first, use thick part

dairy.notes: Savory, cheesy flavor. Not identical but works well.

nuts.notes: Toast sunflower seeds first. Very similar flavor.
Grind sunflower seeds into flour. May turn green when baked (harmless).
nuts.cookingAdjustment: Add 1 tsp vinegar to prevent greening

peanuts.notes: Similar texture and use. Different flavor but works well.
High smoke point. Good for frying.
Use sunflower seed butter instead of peanut butter in recipe.

soybeans.notes: Soy-free alternative. Slightly sweeter than soy sauce.
soybeans.cookingAdjustment: May want to reduce sugar in recipe

soybeans.notes: Made from chickpea flour. Different texture but similar use.

fish.ratio: 1 tbsp fish sauce = 1 tbsp soy sauce + 1/2 tsp lime juice
fish.notes: Not identical but provides umami + acidity.

fish.ratio: 2 anchovies = 1 tsp capers + 1/4 tsp soy sauce

sesame.alternative: olive oil + toasted pumpkin seed oil
sesame.ratio: 1 part olive + 1 part pumpkin seed oil
sesame.notes: Pumpkin seed oil provides nutty flavor.

alwaysCheck: Ask about cooking equipment (shared fryers, pans)
Inform all kitchen staff about allergen restriction
Have backup plan if substitution doesn't work
crossContaminationPrevention: Change gloves between allergen and allergen-free prep

metadata.source: Compiled from food allergy resources and restaurant best practices
